name: GitHub Outbound Connector
description: Switch between GitHub Issues and Branches operations

steps.name: Issues
steps.description: Manage GitHub issues

steps.name: Create an issue
steps.description: Create a new GitHub issue

steps.name: Create an issue comment
steps.description: Add a comment to an existing issue

steps.name: Get an issue
steps.description: Get details of a specific issue

steps.name: List commits
steps.description: List commits in a repository

steps.name: Search issues and pull requests
steps.description: Search issues and pull requests across GitHub

steps.name: Update an issue
steps.description: Update an existing issue

steps.name: Branches
steps.description: Manage repository branches

steps.name: Get a branch
steps.description: Get details of a specific branch

steps.name: List branches
steps.description: List all branches in a repository

steps.name: Merge a branch
steps.description: Merge one branch into another

properties.label: Operation group
properties.description: Choose operation group

properties.label: Authentication
properties.description: Specify AWS authentication strategy. Learn more at the documentation page

properties.label: Access key
properties.description: Provide an IAM access key tailored to a user, equipped with the necessary permissions

properties.label: Secret key
properties.description: Provide a secret key of a user with permissions to invoke specified AWS Lambda function

properties.label: Region
properties.description: Specify the AWS region

properties.label: Endpoint
properties.description: Specify endpoint if need to use custom endpoint

properties.label: AWS bucket
properties.tooltip: Bucket from where an object should be deleted

properties.label: AWS key
properties.tooltip: Key of the object which should be deleted

properties.label: AWS bucket
properties.tooltip: Bucket from where an object should be uploaded

properties.label: AWS key
properties.tooltip: Key of the uploaded object, if not given. The file name from the document metadata will be used

properties.label: Document source
properties.tooltip: Document to be uploaded on AWS S3

properties.value: =if action_document_documentSource = "camunda" then action_document_camundaReference else if action_document_documentSource = "inline" then { "camunda.document.type": "inline", content: action_document_inline_content, name: action_document_inline_fileName, contentType: action_document_inline_contentType } else if action_document_documentSource = "external" then { "camunda.document.type": "external", url: action_document_external_url, name: action_document_external_fileName } else null

properties.label: AWS bucket
properties.tooltip: Bucket from where an object should be downloaded

properties.label: AWS key
properties.tooltip: Key of the object which should be download

properties.label: Create document
properties.tooltip: If set to true, a document reference will be created. If set to false, the content will be extracted and provided inside the response.

properties.label: Version
properties.description: Version of the element template

properties.label: ID
properties.description: ID of the element template

properties.label: Result variable
properties.description: Name of variable to store the response in. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Expression to map the response into process variables. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Error expression
properties.description: Expression to handle errors. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retries

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.description: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries

name: Box Outbound Connector
description: Interact with the Box Document API

properties.label: Operation
properties.description: The operation to execute.

properties.label: Recursive
properties.description: Deletes all items contained by the folder

properties.label: Document source
properties.description: The document reference that will be uploaded

properties.value: =if document_documentSource = "camunda" then document_camundaReference else if document_documentSource = "inline" then { "camunda.document.type": "inline", content: document_inline_content, name: document_inline_fileName, contentType: document_inline_contentType } else if document_documentSource = "external" then { "camunda.document.type": "external", url: document_external_url, name: document_external_fileName } else null

properties.label: File path
properties.description: Path to the file item to download

properties.description: Column for sorting search results

name: Google Cloud Storage Outbound Connector
description: Upload and download files from Google Cloud Storage.
keywords: download file from google cloud storage
upload file to google cloud storage

properties.label: GCP project
properties.tooltip: The project where the bucket is located.

properties.label: Object Storage bucket
properties.tooltip: A bucket acts as a directory that organizes a set of objects.

properties.label: File name
properties.tooltip: Specify the name of the document to be downloaded.

properties.label: Return document as reference
properties.tooltip:
If checked, a Camunda document is created and its reference is returned
If not checked, no document is created and the content is passed as is

properties.label: GCP project
properties.tooltip: The project where the bucket is located.

properties.label: Object Storage bucket
properties.tooltip: A bucket acts as a directory that organizes a set of objects.

properties.label: Document source
properties.tooltip: Document to be uploaded to Google Cloud Storage.

properties.value: =if operation_document_documentSource = "camunda" then operation_document_camundaReference else if operation_document_documentSource = "inline" then { "camunda.document.type": "inline", content: operation_document_inline_content, name: operation_document_inline_fileName, contentType: operation_document_inline_contentType } else if operation_document_documentSource = "external" then { "camunda.document.type": "external", url: operation_document_external_url, name: operation_document_external_fileName } else null

properties.label: JSON key of the service account
properties.description: This is the key of the service account in JSON format. See documentation for details.

properties.label: Document file name
properties.tooltip: By default, the file's metadata name is used unless a custom name is specified.

properties.label: Version
properties.description: Version of the element template

properties.label: ID
properties.description: ID of the element template

properties.label: Result variable
properties.description: Name of variable to store the response in. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Expression to map the response into process variables. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Error expression
properties.description: Expression to handle errors. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retries

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.description: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries

steps.name: Download object
steps.description: Download an object from a Google Cloud Storage bucket

steps.name: Upload object
steps.description: Upload an object to a Google Cloud Storage bucket

name: Azure Blob Storage Outbound Connector
description: Upload and download files from Azure Blob Storage.
keywords: download file from azure blob storage
upload file to azure blob storage

properties.label: Blob Storage container
properties.tooltip: A container acts as a directory that organizes a set of blobs.

properties.label: File name
properties.tooltip: Specify the name of the document to be downloaded.

properties.label: Return document as reference
properties.tooltip: By default, only a reference to the document is returned. If this option is unchecked, the full content of the document is extracted and included in the response.

properties.label: Blob Storage container
properties.tooltip: A container acts as a directory that organizes a set of blobs.

properties.label: Document source
properties.tooltip: Document to be uploaded to Azure Blob Storage.

properties.value: =if operation_document_documentSource = "camunda" then operation_document_camundaReference else if operation_document_documentSource = "inline" then { "camunda.document.type": "inline", content: operation_document_inline_content, name: operation_document_inline_fileName, contentType: operation_document_inline_contentType } else if operation_document_documentSource = "external" then { "camunda.document.type": "external", url: operation_document_external_url, name: operation_document_external_fileName } else null

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Choose the authentication type.

properties.label: SAS token
properties.description: Shared access signature (SAS) token of the container. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: SAS URL
properties.description: Shared access signature (SAS) URL of the container. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: Tenant id
properties.description: The tenant id. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: Client id
properties.description: The client if of the application. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: Client secret
properties.description: The client secret of the application. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: Account url
properties.description: The account url of the storage account. Learn more in our documentation.

properties.label: Document file name
properties.tooltip: By default, the file's metadata name is used unless a custom name is specified.

properties.label: Version
properties.description: Version of the element template

properties.label: ID
properties.description: ID of the element template

properties.label: Result variable
properties.description: Name of variable to store the response in. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Expression to map the response into process variables. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Error expression
properties.description: Expression to handle errors. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retries

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.description: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries

steps.name: Download blob
steps.description: Download a blob from Azure Blob Storage

steps.name: Upload blob
steps.description: Upload a blob to Azure Blob Storage
